description.en: Claim your winnings from a resolved prediction market on Polymarket. Exchange winning shares for USDC using the Conditional Token Framework.
description.de: Fordere deine Gewinne aus einem aufgelösten Prognosemarkt auf Polymarket ein. Tausche gewinnende Anteile gegen USDC über das Conditional Token Framework.
description.es: Claim your winnings from a resolved prediction market on Polymarket. Exchange winning shares for USDC using the Conditional Token Framework.
description.fr: Claim your winnings from a resolved prediction market on Polymarket. Exchange winning shares for USDC using the Conditional Token Framework.
description.ro: Claim your winnings from a resolved prediction market on Polymarket. Exchange winning shares for USDC using the Conditional Token Framework.
description.it: Claim your winnings from a resolved prediction market on Polymarket. Exchange winning shares for USDC using the Conditional Token Framework.

actions.abi: function redeemPositions(address collateralToken, bytes32 parentCollectionId, bytes32 conditionId, uint256[] calldata indexSets) external

description.en: The parent collection ID (bytes32 hex string, often 0x0).
description.es: The parent collection ID (bytes32 hex string, often 0x0).
description.fr: The parent collection ID (bytes32 hex string, often 0x0).
description.ro: The parent collection ID (bytes32 hex string, often 0x0).
description.it: The parent collection ID (bytes32 hex string, often 0x0).

description.en: The condition ID of the resolved market (bytes32 hex string).
description.de: Die Condition-ID des aufgelösten Marktes (bytes32 Hex-String).
description.es: The condition ID of the resolved market (bytes32 hex string).
description.fr: The condition ID of the resolved market (bytes32 hex string).
description.ro: The condition ID of the resolved market (bytes32 hex string).
description.it: The condition ID of the resolved market (bytes32 hex string).

description.en: Array of index sets for the winning outcome (e.g., [1] for YES, [2] for NO).
description.de: Array von Index-Sets für das gewinnende Ergebnis (z.B. [1] für YES, [2] für NO).
description.es: Array of index sets for the winning outcome (e.g., [1] for YES, [2] for NO).
